creator: osa@FreeBSD.org.ru
text:
On Thu, Dec 27, 2001 at 12:30:54AM +0900, MIHIRA Sanpei Yoshiro wrote:
 >   I can run xmovie-1.8 with linux libstdc++-libc6.2-2.so.3 library
 > under FreeBSD(I did not test 1.9 yet). But I could not create
 > libstdc++-libc6.2-2.so.3 ports because I don't have enough time....
 > 
 >   Do you have a plan to create libstdc++-libc6.2-2.so.3 ports?
 
 Hmm, looks like emulators/linux_base-7/pkg-plist containes record
 about libstdc++-3-libc6.2-2-2.10.0.so.
 
 What do you think about change RUN_DEPENDS= in xmoview/Makefile
 from
  ${LINUX_BASE}/lib/libc.so.6:${PORTSDIR}/emulators/linux_base
 to
  ${LINUX_BASE}/lib/libc.so.6:${PORTSDIR}/emulators/linux_base-7
 ?
 
 --
